description: Mine by day, survive by night. Strike rock with your pickaxe in a falling-sand world: dig dirt, stone, copper, iron and mithril, smelt ores in a furnace, and craft picks, swords and armor. Build a sealed base with bed and door before dusk — villagers will move in and score you points each dawn, but zombies, raining slimes, bombers and burrowing ghosts hunt you all night. Cave-ins, sand pours, water spreads and lava oozes are real. Survive as many days as you can and chase the top 5 highscore.
